title: Vibe connected boards

posts.author: RaraAoki (Rara )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently building an app using Vibe AI in monday.com and I have a question about connecting additional boards.

When creating the app initially, I understand that we can connect up to 5 boards during the setup stage. However, my app is already in progress and I now need to connect another board to it.

The problem is that I cannot find any option to do this. I have looked everywhere but there is no “+ Add Board” or “Connect Board” button in the app settings or interface.

My question is:

Is it possible to add another board after the Vibe app has already been created?
If yes, where can I find the option to connect an additional board?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I had this same issue recently and no matter what I did, I couldn’t link additional boards after I’d already started. I ended up starting over.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @RaraAoki Welcome to the community!

At the moment, once a Vibe app has been created, you can’t add or remove boards from it. The option to connect up to five boards is only available during the initial setup.

If you need to bring in data from additional boards, a practical workaround is to mirror that data into one of the boards already connected to your Vibe app. That way, the app can still access the information indirectly without needing to be rebuilt.
